[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000000 2
1 0000000000 a
2 0110001000 3
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0110000000 2
7 0100000000 1
